notableEvents.label: Cedric Mullins pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Cedric Mullins flies out to right fielder Jesús Sánchez.

notableEvents.label: Cedric Mullins pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Cedric Mullins singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder Jesús Sánchez.

notableEvents.label: Jonny DeLuca GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jonny DeLuca grounds into a double play, shortstop Andrés Giménez to second baseman Ernie Clement to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Jonathan Aranda out at 2nd. Jonny DeLuca out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Andrés Giménez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Andrés Giménez grounds into a double play, second baseman Ben Williamson to shortstop Taylor Walls to first baseman Jonathan Aranda. Myles Straw out at 2nd. Andrés Giménez out at 1st.
